name: sample_sobol_v3_8d_gradual_twist
_doc: 16-case Sobol sweep over the 8 dimensions corresponding to v3's knobs, using v2's underlying parameter names (since v3 has no sample mode). arch_twist_deg is forced into [10°, 30°] via distribution_overrides so EVERY case has visible gradual twist — the user wanted all-non-zero twist for a 'show me what gradual twist looks like' gallery. Fourier δ_3/δ_4 held at 0 to match v3's planar-arch-with-twist convention. Mapping to v3: r_ascending↔r_inlet, r_descending↔r_outlet, arch_R_c+arch_angle_deg↔(arch_width_mm, arch_height_mm), arch_tilt_deg↔torsion_deg, arch_twist_deg↔twist_deg.
